examFramework.name: BUEPT (official framework)

sections.label: Listening
sections.format: Selective + Careful listening; each recording is played once.

sections.label: Reading
sections.format: Two texts with around 10 questions per text.

sections.label: Writing
sections.format: Two essays; each task has a 40-minute writing limit.

coreRules: Writing section requires at least 56 average.
Overall pass is based on section thresholds plus total score policy announced by YADYOK.

programs.focus: Core language foundation and intensive classroom progression.
Integrated skills with stronger reading/listening coverage.
Upper-intermediate skill development and exam preparation.
Academic reading, listening, writing; grammar as support.

notes: Since 2024-2025, attendance and accepted-report limits are managed under a single 15% absence cap.
If 15% is exceeded, students lose related in-term exam rights and continue with the next available exam cycle.

gradingPolicy.winterBueptRule: Winter BUEPT eligibility is tied to P2-P4 average requirements; P1 students are not eligible.

partialPassPolicy.summary: Partial pass applies to students who completed two semesters in prep.
details: Component exemptions start with Spring proficiency exam.
Exempted components are valid for one year.
